last_cycle.reason: Backend got ~95% done in cycle 1 but timed out before committing. All files are on the feature branch but untracked. Finish only what remains: route registration, pint cleanup, run the 9 tests and fix any failures, commit + push. Don't re-read design.md.

Frontend timed out before writing anything. Backend is now available on feature/ai-work-order-suggester-backend — build the panel matching its API contract. Fresh prompt, focused on files only (component + composable + tests + i18n + wire into Show.vue), don't re-survey the codebase excessively.

next_cycle.title: Backend — finish route + tests + commit
next_cycle.prompt:
## Status

You are continuing **backend work that is ~95% complete** from cycle 1. Your branch is `feature/ai-work-order-suggester-backend`. The previous run timed out at 15min before committing. **All your files are on disk, untracked, in the main checkout.** Do NOT re-implement from scratch. Do NOT re-read the full design.md.

## Files you already wrote (confirmed present)

- `app/Http/Requests/WorkOrder/WorkOrderSuggestionRequest.php` ✓
- `app/Services/AI/MockSuggester.php` ✓
- `app/Services/AI/WorkOrderSuggestionService.php` ✓
- `app/Http/Controllers/Api/WorkOrderSuggestionController.php` ✓
- `app/Exceptions/AI/WorkOrderAiInvalidResponseException.php` ✓
- `database/seeders/WorkOrderSuggestionPromptSeeder.php` ✓
- `tests/Feature/WorkOrderSuggestionTest.php` ✓
- `resources/js/i18n/lang/ar.json` + `en.json` (modified)

## What is missing (your job in this retry)

1. **Register the route** in `routes/api.php`. Place it RIGHT AFTER the existing `/v1/ai/demo/describe-vehicle` route:
   ```php
   Route::post('/v1/work-orders/{workOrder}/suggestions',
       [WorkOrderSuggestionController::class, 'suggest'])
       ->middleware(['auth:sanctum', 'tenant.active', TrackAiUsage::class, 'throttle:30,1'])
       ->name('api.work_orders.suggestions');
   ```
   Verify: `php artisan route:list --name=api.work_orders.suggestions` shows it.

2. **Run pint** on all new/modified PHP files: `vendor/bin/pint app/Services/AI/WorkOrderSuggestionService.php app/Services/AI/MockSuggester.php app/Http/Controllers/Api/WorkOrderSuggestionController.php app/Http/Requests/WorkOrder/WorkOrderSuggestionRequest.php app/Exceptions/AI/WorkOrderAiInvalidResponseException.php database/seeders/WorkOrderSuggestionPromptSeeder.php tests/Feature/WorkOrderSuggestionTest.php`

3. **Run the new tests**: `php artisan test --filter=WorkOrderSuggestionTest`. ALL 9 tests must pass. If any fail, read the error, fix the implementation file (NOT the test), re-run until green.

4. **Run full suite once** to confirm no regression: `php artisan test`. Pre-existing `ExampleTest` failure is acceptable; everything else must remain green.

5. **Commit and push** to your branch:
   ```bash
   git add app/Http/Controllers/Api/WorkOrderSuggestionController.php \
           app/Http/Requests/WorkOrder/WorkOrderSuggestionRequest.php \
           app/Services/AI/WorkOrderSuggestionService.php \
           app/Services/AI/MockSuggester.php \
           app/Exceptions/AI/WorkOrderAiInvalidResponseException.php \
           database/seeders/WorkOrderSuggestionPromptSeeder.php \
           tests/Feature/WorkOrderSuggestionTest.php \
           resources/js/i18n/lang/ar.json \
           resources/js/i18n/lang/en.json \
           routes/api.php
   git commit -m "feat(ai): work order service suggester — backend API, MockSuggester, 9 tests"
   git push -u origin feature/ai-work-order-suggester-backend
   ```
   DO NOT commit any `.dylib` files, `public/build/assets/*.js`, or `.opencode/tmp/*` — they are runtime scratch and must stay out of the index. Use `git status` before commit to verify ONLY your intent files are staged.

## Hard rule

- The pre-commit hook we configured (husky + lint-staged) will run on commit. If it fails (pint/eslint/prettier), FIX the flagged files and `git commit --amend --no-edit`. Don't skip hooks.
- Pre-existing `ExampleTest` failure is fine.
- If a test fails, debug the implementation; do NOT modify `tests/Feature/WorkOrderSuggestionTest.php` — the test file is the contract.

## Deliverable

Write a short `deliverable.md` at repo root with:
- Exact list of files committed.
- Commit hash + branch name.
- Test counts (e.g. `php artisan test --filter=WorkOrderSuggestionTest`: 9/9 passed).
- Any deviations from design.md (with reason).

Report the branch name + commit hash in your reply.

next_cycle.title: Frontend — build panel + composable + i18n + tests
next_cycle.prompt:
## Status

Backend is ready on branch `feature/ai-work-order-suggester-backend` (the WorkOrder suggestion API). You are building the **frontend half** that consumes it. Read `docs/features/ai-service-suggester/design.md` §9 (frontend contract) and §10 (frontend tests) — that is your spec.

## Time budget

You have 15 minutes. **Do not re-survey the entire codebase.** Read JUST what you need from the existing patterns:
- One existing composable (e.g. `resources/js/Composables/useWorkOrderItems.js`) for pattern reference.
- One existing test in `resources/js/Composables/__tests__/` for vitest setup pattern.
- One existing WorkOrders component (e.g. `WorkOrderNotesTab.vue`) for the App* design system pattern.
- The current `Show.vue` to find the right insertion point (right after `WorkOrderComplaintAssessment`, before the tabs container).

## Files to create/modify (FINAL list — be exact)

1. `resources/js/Composables/useWorkOrderSuggestions.js` — composable with `suggestions`, `isLoading`, `error`, `meta`, `refresh`, `isStale` (per contract §9). Debounced 600ms. Fetches POST to `/api/v1/work-orders/{id}/suggestions` with `{ complaint, vehicle, limit }`.
2. `resources/js/Components/WorkOrders/WorkOrderSuggestionsPanel.vue` — the panel component. Card-style list of suggestions: confidence badge (high/medium/low based on 0.7/0.4 threshold), item name + department + price + reason + Add button. Emits `add` and `error` events. Uses `App*` design system components.
3. `resources/js/Pages/WorkOrders/Show.vue` — wire the panel in. Pass `workOrder` prop. Listen for `add` event to push a new service/part item to the work order (use the existing `useWorkOrderItems.addItem` or equivalent; do not re-implement item-add plumbing).
4. `resources/js/Composables/__tests__/useWorkOrderSuggestions.test.js` — the 4 tests from §10. Mock axios/inertia fetch.
5. `resources/js/i18n/lang/ar.json` + `en.json` — add 6-8 panel-specific keys (e.g. `workorders.suggestions.title`, `...confidence_high`, `...confidence_medium`, `...confidence_low`, `...no_suggestions`, `...loading`, `...error`, `...add`).

## Hard rules

- All copy goes through `__()` or `$t()` — no hard-coded English/Arabic strings in the component.
- RTL-safe — no fixed px paddings that break in RTL.
- Use `App*` components (`AppButton`, `AppSelect`, `AppTextarea`) — do NOT introduce custom Tailwind buttons.
- The panel must NOT break the existing tabs (NotesTab, PhotosTab, etc.) — make sure Show.vue still renders all current tabs.
- Run `npm run build` and `npm run type-check` before commit.
- Run `npm run test` (vitest) — your 4 new tests must pass.

## Git

```bash
git checkout -b feature/ai-work-order-suggester-frontend
# create/modify files
git add resources/js/Composables/useWorkOrderSuggestions.js \
        resources/js/Components/WorkOrders/WorkOrderSuggestionsPanel.vue \
        resources/js/Composables/__tests__/useWorkOrderSuggestions.test.js \
        resources/js/Pages/WorkOrders/Show.vue \
        resources/js/i18n/lang/ar.json \
        resources/js/i18n/lang/en.json
git commit -m "feat(ai): work order suggestions panel + composable + 4 vitest tests"
git push -u origin feature/ai-work-order-suggester-frontend
```

The husky pre-commit hook will run; if it fails on lint/prettier, fix the files and `git commit --amend --no-edit`.

## Deliverable

Write `deliverable.md` at repo root listing: files added/modified, test count, `npm run build` exit code, `npm run test` exit code, commit hash + branch.

next_cycle.title: Integration gate — backend + frontend together
next_cycle.prompt:
Run an end-to-end smoke check on the combined AI Work Order Suggester feature.

## Steps

1. Checkout the integration branch / worktree combining `feature/ai-work-order-suggester-backend` and `feature/ai-work-order-suggester-frontend`. (If the project uses the main checkout for both branches, cherry-pick or merge both into a local `integration/ai-suggester-test` branch.)
2. Run `npm run build` — must exit 0.
3. Run `npm run type-check` — must exit 0.
4. Run `npm run test` — all vitest pass.
5. Run `php artisan test` — only the pre-existing `ExampleTest` failure is acceptable; everything else must pass.
6. Boot the dev server (`php artisan serve` + `npm run dev` in background, or use existing `.mavis/run.sh` if present). Hit the suggestions endpoint with a seeded user who has a tenant + center + a non-empty catalog. Expected: HTTP 200 with `meta.provider === 'mock'` and at least 1 suggestion. Capture the response.
7. Cross-tenant probe: tenant A user's request for a tenant B work order returns 404 (route model binding + global scope).
8. Empty-catalog probe: a tenant with no services returns 200 with `suggestions: []` and `meta.total_candidates === 0`.

## Output

Write `integration-gate-report.md` at repo root with:
- Build / type-check / test command outputs.
- Smoke test request + response (anonymized).
- Cross-tenant probe result.
- Empty-catalog probe result.
- Verdict line: `VERDICT: PASS` or `VERDICT: FAIL — <gap>`.

message_to_user: Round 2: backend ~95% done (killed before commit), retry only finishes + tests + pushes. Frontend builds fresh against the now-ready backend branch.
